title: 06-generate-command: Create file-saver.js module with saveFile and generateFilename
description: New src/lib/file-saver.js module. saveFile(url, outputDir, modelId, opts) downloads any content type, generateFilename(modelId, ext, opts) supports optional _NNN suffix for multi-file output. Extended EXTENSION_MAP for image/video/audio types. Tests in file-saver.test.js.

title: 06-generate-command: Create generate.js command with flags, SIGINT, human/JSON output
description: New src/commands/generate.js incur command. Flags: --model (required), --prompt (required), --image (array), --size (enum), --output, --seed, --category, --verbose. Comma-split --image, upload local files, SIGINT handling, human summary + verbose mode. Returns GenerateResult for incur --json. Tests in generate.test.js.
notes: Parent: fal-cli-ex8. Depends on file-saver task. Verify: pnpm test

title: Add runGeneration() and extractOutputFiles() to fal-client
description: Add two new functions to fal-client.js: runGeneration() wraps fal.subscribe and returns {data, requestId}; extractOutputFiles() normalizes varying response shapes into a consistent files array.
design:
## Context
Tracer bullet task 1/3. These are the core API functions the generate command depends on. generateImage() is NOT modified — runGeneration() is a new function alongside it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] runGeneration(input, onStatus, options) calls fal.subscribe and returns { data, requestId }
- [ ] extractOutputFiles(data) handles: images[], video, audio, and fallback CDN URL walking
- [ ] Both functions exported from fal-client.js
- [ ] Basic unit tests for both functions pass

## Files
- `src/lib/fal-client.js` (modify) — add runGeneration() and extractOutputFiles() after existing generateImage() at line 172
- `src/lib/fal-client.test.js` (modify) — add test sections for runGeneration and extractOutputFiles

## Patterns
- See `generateImage()` in `src/lib/fal-client.js:172` for fal.subscribe pattern and onStatus callback shape
- See existing tests in `src/lib/fal-client.test.js` for test structure and fal client mocking

## Tests
- runGeneration with mocked fal client returns { data, requestId }
- extractOutputFiles with { images: [{ url, width, height }] } returns correct array
- extractOutputFiles with { video: { url } } returns [{ url }]
- extractOutputFiles with { audio: { url } } returns [{ url }]
- extractOutputFiles with mixed images+video returns all
- extractOutputFiles with {} returns []
- extractOutputFiles fallback: nested object with fal.media URL
- extractOutputFiles ignores non-CDN URLs

## Verify
node --test src/lib/fal-client.test.js

title: Add generate command integration tests
description: Integration tests for the full generate flow: end-to-end with mocked fal client, --json output shape, error cases, SIGINT handling.
design:
## Context
Post-tracer expansion. End-to-end integration tests that validate the full generate pipeline works correctly. These are flow-level tests that mock dependencies and test the handler logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: full generate flow (subscribe → extract → save → return) with mocked deps
- [ ] Test: --json output matches GenerateResult shape (model, seed, requestId, files[])
- [ ] Test: multi-file output saves all files with _001, _002 suffixes
- [ ] Test: image-to-image flow (--image flag resolves and passes URLs)
- [ ] Test: --seed passed through and returned in result
- [ ] Test: --output overrides default directory
- [ ] Test: error on no output files extracted (unknown response shape)
- [ ] Test: verbose mode includes request/response data

## Files
- `src/commands/generate.test.js` (modify) — add integration test sections (file created by fal-cli-kkb)

## Patterns
- See `src/commands/interactive.test.js` for integration test patterns with mocked deps (dependency injection via options object)
- See `src/commands/generate.test.js` for existing basic tests to extend

## Tests
All listed in acceptance criteria above.

## Verify
node --test src/commands/generate.test.js

title: 06-generate-command: Non-interactive generate command for agents
description: Implementation of specs/06-generate-command.md — flag-based generate command exposing all interactive-mode capabilities for AI agents and scripts.

title: Create generate command with incur and register in CLI
description: Create src/commands/generate.js with the incur command definition, handler logic (flag parsing, image resolution, generation, file saving, output formatting), and register it in src/index.js.
design:
## Context
Tracer bullet task 3/3. This wires everything together into a working command. Depends on tasks 1 and 2 for runGeneration, extractOutputFiles, and saveFile.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Command defined with incur: model (required string), prompt (required string), image (optional string array), size (optional enum from IMAGE_SIZE_PRESETS), output (optional string), seed (optional number), category (optional string)
- [ ] Handler: loads config, resolves config with flag overrides, flattens --image (comma-split + flatMap), resolves image URLs, registers SIGINT handler, calls runGeneration, extracts output files, saves all files with suffix for multi-file, builds GenerateResult, prints human-readable summary, returns result for --json auto-serialization
- [ ] --verbose prints request input and raw response after summary
- [ ] SIGINT handler stops spinner and exits 0
- [ ] Command registered in src/index.js as cli.command(generateCommand)
- [ ] withErrorHandling wraps the handler
- [ ] Basic tests for the generate flow pass

## Files
- `src/commands/generate.js` (create) — parent dir `src/commands/` exists
- `src/commands/generate.test.js` (create) — basic unit tests for generate command flow
- `src/index.js` (modify) — add import and cli.command(generateCommand)

## Patterns
- See `src/commands/interactive.js:259` for top-level command definition pattern: `Cli.create('generate', { description, options, run })`
- See `src/commands/models.js:13-15` for options definition with z.object({ ... })
- See `src/commands/interactive.js:1-7` for imports pattern (incur, ora, config, fal-client, error handling)
- See `src/index.js:18-19` for command registration pattern: `cli.command(generateCommand)`
- See `src/commands/interactive.js:232-253` for SIGINT handler pattern (register before generation, remove after)
- `IMAGE_SIZE_PRESETS` exported from `src/config.js:7`, `resolveConfig` from `src/config.js:71`
- `resolveImageUrl` from `src/lib/fal-client.js:144`

## Tests
- Full flow with mocked fal client: subscribe → extract → save → return GenerateResult
- --json output shape matches GenerateResult typedef (model, seed, requestId, files[])
- Comma-split logic: ['a.jpg,b.jpg', 'c.jpg'] → ['a.jpg', 'b.jpg', 'c.jpg']
- Multiple --image flags resolved correctly
- --seed passed through to API input
- --output overrides default directory
- SIGINT handler registered before generation, removed after
- Missing --model or --prompt triggers ValidationError

## Verify
node --test src/commands/generate.test.js

title: Create file-saver.js with saveFile() and generateFilename()
description: New module src/lib/file-saver.js that downloads and saves any media type (image, video, audio) from a URL. Supports multi-file suffix naming.
design:
## Context
Tracer bullet task 2/3. The existing image-saver.js is NOT modified — it stays for the interactive command. file-saver.js handles any content type and adds suffix support for multi-file output.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] saveFile(url, outputDir, modelId, options) downloads and saves any file type
- [ ] Retries once on download failure
- [ ] EXTENSION_MAP covers image/png, image/jpeg, image/webp, image/gif, video/mp4, video/webm, audio/mpeg, audio/wav, audio/ogg, application/json
- [ ] generateFilename(modelId, ext, options) supports optional suffix (e.g. _001) and now param for testing
- [ ] Returns { localPath, contentType }
- [ ] Basic unit tests pass

## Files
- `src/lib/file-saver.js` (create) — parent dir `src/lib/` exists
- `src/lib/file-saver.test.js` (create) — basic unit tests for saveFile and generateFilename

## Patterns
- See `src/lib/image-saver.js` for saveImage() pattern (retry logic at line 55, mkdir, fetch mock injection via options._fetch)
- See `generateFilename()` in `src/lib/image-saver.js:39` for naming pattern — extend with suffix support
- See `modelSlug()` in `src/lib/image-saver.js:26` — reuse or duplicate this helper
- See `src/lib/image-saver.test.js` for test structure and fetch mocking pattern

## Tests
- saveFile with mocked fetch (image/png) saves correctly and returns { localPath, contentType }
- saveFile with video/mp4 content-type gets .mp4 extension
- saveFile with unknown content-type falls back appropriately
- saveFile retries once on failure, throws on second failure
- generateFilename without suffix produces standard name
- generateFilename with suffix '_001' appends before extension
- generateFilename uses modelSlug correctly (fal-ai/flux/schnell → flux-schnell)

## Verify
node --test src/lib/file-saver.test.js

title: Add unit tests for extractOutputFiles edge cases
description: Expand test coverage for extractOutputFiles: mixed response shapes, nested CDN URLs, non-CDN URL filtering, empty/malformed responses.
design:

Post-tracer expansion. Ensures extractOutputFiles handles all edge cases from the spec's response normalization section.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: images array with multiple items extracts all
- [ ] Test: video with optional metadata fields (content_type, file_name, file_size)
- [ ] Test: audio with optional metadata fields
- [ ] Test: mixed images + video extracts all
- [ ] Test: deeply nested object with fal.media URL found by fallback walker
- [ ] Test: non-fal URLs (e.g. input image URLs echoed back) are ignored
- [ ] Test: empty object returns empty array
- [ ] Test: null/undefined data returns empty array

## Files
